'''jachoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squalling|squalling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squalling|squalling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jachoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæcheyeth|jæcheyeth]] || [[word:jæcheyej|jæcheyej]] || [[word:jæcheyesh|jæcheyesh]] || [[word:jæcheye|jæcheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jachochoyoth|jachochoyoth]] || [[word:jachochoyoj|jachochoyoj]] || [[word:jachochoyosh|jachochoyosh]] || [[word:jachochoyo|jachochoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jachoyoth|jachoyoth]] || [[word:jachoyoj|jachoyoj]] || [[word:jachoyosh|jachoyosh]] || [[word:jachoyo|jachoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jachofyoth|jachofyoth]] || [[word:jachofyoj|jachofyoj]] || [[word:jachofyosh|jachofyosh]] || [[word:jachofyof|jachofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jachoyotho|jachoyotho]] || [[word:jachoyojo|jachoyojo]] || [[word:jachoyosho|jachoyosho]] || [[word:jachoyoko|jachoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jachoyoth|jachoyoth]] || [[word:jachoyoj|jachoyoj]] || [[word:jachoyosh|jachoyosh]] || [[word:jachoyo|jachoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jachoyothol|jachoyothol]] || [[word:jachoyojol|jachoyojol]] || [[word:jachoyoshol|jachoyoshol]] || [[word:jachoyokol|jachoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jachoyothotho|jachoyothotho]] || [[word:jachoyojojo|jachoyojojo]] || [[word:jachoyoshosho|jachoyoshosho]] || [[word:jachoyoko|jachoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jachoyothon|jachoyothon]] || [[word:jachoyojon|jachoyojon]] || [[word:jachoyoshon|jachoyoshon]] || [[word:jachoyokon|jachoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jachoyothoro|jachoyothoro]] || [[word:jachoyojoro|jachoyojoro]] || [[word:jachoyoshoro|jachoyoshoro]] || [[word:jachoyokoro|jachoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
